The king who is possessed of royal power and majesty and is
accompanied by a veterinary surgeon and an astrologer, should take
his seat on a tiger-skin facing the east in front of the sacred fire.
*nwn ^ i
Whatever symptoms of the altar, priest and fire have been
given in my work on Yatrft (Journey) in connection with the
sacrifices to the planets and Indra's Banner, should be carefully
noted and applied to this ceremony as well.
